# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `OR-001`
- Title: `Automate GitHub Pages deployment`
- Persona/Actor: `Maintainer`
- Value statement: `For maintainers, deliver automated GitHub Pages deployment to achieve repeatable and auditable releases.`
- Context: `Release pipeline from main branch to production-hosted static site.`
- Problem statement: `Manual deploys introduce inconsistency and increase rollback risk.`
- Expected outcome: `Every approved merge can be deployed via deterministic GitHub Actions workflow to gh-pages.`
- Success metric(s): `Deployment success rate >= 95% over first ten release runs with observable logs.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Workflow builds static site and publishes to gh-pages.`
  - `Pages source is configured to GitHub Actions.`
  - `Deployment logs include artifact provenance and commit SHA.`
- Non-goals: `Blue/green deployments, multi-environment release orchestration.`
- Constraints: `No generated output committed to main; deployment artifact generated in CI.`
- Dependencies: `QR-001 CI quality gates.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes repository permissions allow gh-pages publish from Actions.`
- Validation approach: `Pipeline dry run, production verification, rollback rehearsal.`
- Priority score: `94`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#OR-001`
  - ADR: `n/a`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
